description: Danny discusses building a Solana SDK for Unreal, enabling game development with Solana integration. He highlights the ease of generating Unreal modules from anchor IDLs and offers personal support for developers.
topic_summary: Overview of a Solana SDK for Unreal that simplifies game development by allowing users to generate compliant Unreal modules from anchor IDLs. Danny offers one-on-one support for developers interested in building on Solana [t=0:24].
